LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Whitespring-puolustukset
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Whitespring sodan ratkaisuja
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Rakenna presidentin sisustusta, kuten Whitespring-matot, peilit, suuret tuolit, Whitespring-laatat, kyntteliköt ja paljon muuta.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: presidentin sisustus
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Rakenna presidentin työtuoli, joka sopii Whitespringin johtaville virkamiehille ja heidän seremoniallisiin tehtäviinsä.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: presidentin työtuoli
